questions.question_text: Answer the following questions CO Mapping a What is the primary function of a Data Scientist? Mention three important tools they often use. 2.5 b Explain the concept of "Data Ethics". How is it relevant in Data Science practices? 2.5 c Write Python code using pandas to replace all NaN values in a DataFrame df with the column mean. 2.5 d Generate a 5x3 NumPy array filled with numbers from 10 to 24 and reshape it into a 3x5 array. 2.5 e Mention the difference between subplot and add_axes in Matplotlib. 2.5 f Describe how to create a figure with 3 rows and 2 columns of subplots in matplotlib with shared x-axis. 2.5 g Identify and explain any three filter types available in Tableau and their practical use cases. 2.5 h Explain the difference between Extract Filter and Data Source Filter. 2.5
Describe the major stages in the Data Science Workflow. Give relevant examples of how each stage is applied in business or research. 10
Write a note on the future trends in Data Science. How are emerging fields like AI, IoT, and Big Data shaping the future of data-driven decision-making? 10

subparts.text: Merge them using a common Employee ID
Display details of employees whose salary is below ₹25,000 10
Find the average sale per product in that region 10
Plot it using a line graph with triangle markers and dotted green lines
Create a pie chart of department-wise expenses with custom settings like explode, shadow, and percentage labels 10
Plot a histogram for daily humidity levels
Generate a box plot and interpret its statistical features 10

questions.question_text: Discuss the collaborative features of Tableau and how it supports data sharing and informed decision-making within teams. 10
What are Calculated Fields in Tableau? How do they differ from Parameters? Define a Tableau Set with an example. Explain the difference between Manual Sets and Computed Sets. 10
